title: stigmaphyllon timoriense
intro: Stigmaphyllon timoriense, also known as the Timor stigmata, is a plant species belonging to the family Malpighiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Stigmaphyllon timoriense include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating digestive issues, thanks to its flavonoid and phenolic content. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
